failures.question: List all invoices with customer names and countries
What is the total sales amount by country?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT c.Country, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSales
FROM customer c
JOIN invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.Country;
failures.execution_error:
column c.customerid does not exist
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "c.customer_id".

failures.question: How many albums does each artist have?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT a.artist_id, COUNT(al.album_id) AS album_count
FROM artist a
LEFT JOIN album al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id
GROUP BY a.artist_id;

failures.question: What is the total revenue from all invoices?
failures.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_revenue FROM invoice;

failures.question: What is the total duration of all tracks in minutes?
failures.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(duration) / 60 AS total_duration_minutes FROM track;

failures.question: What is the total revenue for 2022?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM invoice i
JOIN invoice_line il ON i.invoice_id = il.invoice_id
WHERE YEAR(i.invoice_date) = 2022;
failures.execution_error:
function year(timestamp without time zone) does not exist
HINT:  No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

failures.question: Which customers spent the most in 2023?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSpent
FROM customer c
JOIN invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
JOIN invoice_line il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
WHERE YEAR(i.InvoiceDate) = 2023
GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName
ORDER BY TotalSpent DESC;
failures.execution_error:
column c.customerid does not exist
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "c.customer_id".

failures.question: What are the most popular genres by number of tracks sold?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT g.Name AS Genre, COUNT(il.TrackId) AS TracksSold
FROM genre g
JOIN track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId
JOIN invoice_line il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY g.Name
ORDER BY TracksSold DESC;
failures.execution_error:
column g.genreid does not exist
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "g.genre_id".

failures.question: Which artists have the highest total sales revenue?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT a.artist_id, a.name, SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) AS total_sales
FROM artist a
JOIN album al ON a.artist_id = al.artist_id
JOIN track t ON al.album_id = t.album_id
JOIN invoice_line il ON t.track_id = il.track_id
JOIN invoice i ON il.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
GROUP BY a.artist_id, a.name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

failures.question: What is the average invoice total by customer country, for countries with more than 5 customers?
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT c.Country, AVG(i.Total) AS AverageInvoiceTotal
FROM customer c
JOIN invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.Country
HAVING COUNT(c.CustomerId) > 5;
failures.execution_error:
column c.customerid does not exist
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "c.customer_id".

failures.question: Show large orders
failures.generated_sql:
SELECT invoice_id, customer_id, SUM(unit_price * quantity) AS total_order_value
FROM invoice_line
GROUP BY invoice_id, customer_id
